content: Close TASK-076 v6.7.0 release: refresh release docs/manifests to 6.7.0, run release-state-audit with integrated Archmap impact, review provenance, and evidence independence gates, run full tests/smoke/help/organization verification, and prepare tag/release notes. Stop condition: release closure only; no new governance audit families. QIF boundary: v6.7 release readiness is structural/runtime governance evidence, not proof of semantic product quality.
